The '''Battle of Byss''' occurred some time after the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], when the [[Alderaanian Resistance]] launched its final attack on the forces of the [[Sarlacc Project]].

{{Battle-stub}}

==The battle==
By capturing an orbiting [[Space station/Legends|space station]], a team of infiltrators were able to deactivate the defenses of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], allowing the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] fleet of Lady [[Alya Aldrete]] to fly into the [[Super Star Destroyer prototype]]'s [[Reactor/Legends|reactor core]], destroying it and ending the threat.

==Appearances==
*{{DoD|Jaws of the Sarlacc}}
